boundary_binding.action_boundary: May HR or payroll execute the requested workforce, pay, benefits, or employment-status action? Focus: manager transfer update inside approved org-change effective date.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Dependency remains open on authority match
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: org-change effective date and receiving manager authority mismatch remains

critical_features_preserved: org-change effective date and receiving manager authority match
final_answer: Source records do not close the exact execution boundary. The control record says the org-change effective date and receiving manager authority match is missing, stale, mismatched, expired, or scoped elsewhere. Tone, urgency, and normal employee history do not supply authority. Escalate until the exact current control record closes the dependency.
